subject: docs: add iOS browser variant detection to changelog and session notes
body:
HISTORY.md and SESSION_NOTES.md were updated before the iOS CriOS/FxiOS/
EdgiOS detection fix was committed. Added the missing documentation for
the iOS variant detection that made the cross-redirect actually functional.

Tags: docs, pwa
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-reliability
Semver: patch
